gist.headline: Watering the metrics
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating the health metrics and stats for all the lovely apps in our greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of application metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics across the repository.
gist.impact: Keeps the community app directory and greenhouse documentation up to date with the latest health and usage metrics.
gist.visual_concept: The pollinations bee (Polly) and the robot companion checking on plants (apps) in a greenhouse. The robot is holding a clipboard or scanning plants, representing the automated metrics update.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot in a lush digital greenhouse. The robot is scanning glowing code-plants with a small device, while the bee holds a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background. Warm lighting, lo-fi 8-bit aesthetic like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot and a chunky monitor-head robot in a lush digital greenhouse. The robot is scanning glowing code-plants with a small device, while the bee holds a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel mint gradient background.
